query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'chat_sessions' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2mYfLk323U3DU3o.a211c2f19edd --database beXrKFV66UQLVsECzVvhH4 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'chat_sessions' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE	CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH
id	int	NULL
sessionId	varchar(64)	64
userId	int	NULL
presentationId	varchar(64)	64
phase	varchar(64)	64
messages	json	NULL
topic	varchar(512)	512
createdAt	timestamp	NULL
updatedAt	timestamp	NULL
mode	varchar(32)	32
metadata	json	NULL
